image_prompt: A dramatic split-screen composition: on the left, a black-and-white archival-style photograph of a grand government building in Tehran, 1953, with military figures in period uniforms and a crowd gathered outside under a tense atmosphere; on the right, a modern aerial photograph of the Strait of Hormuz from above showing massive oil tankers frozen in the narrow waterway, with naval vessels surrounding them under a red-tinged sky. In the center, a glowing chain of golden dominoes connecting the two scenes, each domino engraved with a year: 1953, 1979, 2018, 2026. The overall mood is cinematic, dark, and historically weighty. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements

A dramatic financial trading floor scene viewed from above at dawn, with massive digital screens covering the walls showing Korean stock market data — KOSPI +5.64% in bright green at the top of the screen, then a sharp arrow falling downward to +0.82% in amber at the bottom. Traders at their desks are visibly tense, some with heads in hands, others staring at screens in disbelief. The lighting is harsh fluorescent white contrasted with deep shadows. In the background through large windows, the Seoul skyline is visible at dusk. The atmosphere conveys disbelief and controlled panic. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements

A photoreal aerial view of the Strait of Hormuz at night, with the narrow waterway dramatically lit from below by the reflection of oil tanker lights. The strait is split down the middle by a glowing fault line — on one side, the water is calm with tankers moving freely and the sky shows dawn breaking (WTI $90 scenario); on the other side, the strait is blocked with naval vessels and warning flares, the sky dark red and ominous (WTI $174 scenario). Above the scene, a massive digital display hovers in the sky showing 'WTI $111.54' with two diverging arrows pointing to '$90' in green and '$174' in red. The perspective is cinematic, wide-angle, high altitude. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements
